name: Dennis Miller
bio: Dennis Miller is an American stand-up comedian and broadcaster known for a densely allusive rant style packed with literary, historical, and pop-culture references. He gained national prominence anchoring Saturday Night Lives Weekend Update from 1985 to 1991 before a run of HBO stand-up specials and the talk show Dennis Miller Live. His comedy is noted for its erudite vocabulary and rapid-fire reference density.

timeline.ev: Joins Saturday Night Live as Weekend Update anchor
HBO special Black and White and album The Off-White Album
Dennis Miller Live debuts on HBO

accolades: Won five Emmy Awards for Dennis Miller Live
Ranked No. 21 on Comedy Central 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time (2004)
